final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);

reg [15:0] storage;

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin storage <= data_in ; // Write data to SRAM
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= storage ;
  end

endmodule
